prompt: Create a clean modern app logo on a pure white background: a rounded cloud-like circular badge made from overlapping soft lobes, filled with a smooth gradient from violet purple at the upper left through bright azure blue to cyan turquoise at the lower right. Inside the badge, depict a minimalist landscape icon with two white snow-covered mountain peaks: one smaller peak on the left and one larger peak centered-right, both with gentle blue shadow gradients along their lower slopes. Add a small solid white sun or moon circle in the upper-left interior. Across the bottom of the mountains, include a flowing curved white wave line separating the snowy peaks from the blue lower area, with subtle depth and glossy highlight effects. Use vector-style simplicity, rounded edges, soft gradients, no text, no border, centered composition, high-resolution app icon aesthetic.
